sentences.sentence: Alexander Henderson was born in Scotland in 1831 and was the son of a successful merchant.
sentences.translation: 亚历山大·亨德森于1831年出生在苏格兰，是一位成功商人的儿子。

structure.text: and was the son of a successful merchant

difficult_points: 句子用 and 连接两个并列谓语，共同说明 Alexander Henderson 的出生地和家庭身份。
was born 是被动形式，但在出生信息中按固定表达理解为“出生”。
of a successful merchant 修饰 the son，说明父亲的身份。

sentences.sentence: His grandfather, also called Alexander, had founded the family business, and later became the first chairman of the National Bank of Scotland.
sentences.translation: 他的祖父也叫亚历山大，创办了家族企业，后来成为苏格兰国家银行的首任主席。

structure.text: and later became the first chairman of the National Bank of Scotland

difficult_points: also called Alexander 是过去分词短语，补充说明 grandfather 的名字。
had founded 使用过去完成时，表示创办家族企业发生在后文 became 之前。
and later became 与 had founded 并列，描述祖父职业发展的两个阶段。

sentences.sentence: The family had extensive landholdings in Scotland.
sentences.translation: 这个家族在苏格兰拥有大面积土地。
difficult_points: had 在这里表示“拥有”，不是完成时助动词。
extensive 修饰 landholdings，强调土地规模很大。
in Scotland 限定这些土地所有权所在的地区。

sentences.sentence: Besides its residence in Edinburgh, it owned Press Estate, 650 acres of farmland about 35 miles southeast of the city.
sentences.translation: 除了在爱丁堡的住所外，这个家族还拥有普雷斯庄园，那是一片位于该城东南约35英里处、面积650英亩的农田。

structure.text: 650 acres of farmland about 35 miles southeast of the city

difficult_points: Besides 引出的介词短语表示“除了……之外”，补充说明家族不止一处地产。
it 指代上一句中的 The family。
650 acres of farmland 是 Press Estate 的同位语，说明庄园的面积和位置。

sentences.sentence: The family often stayed at Press Castle, the large mansion on the northern edge of the property, and Alexander spent much of his childhood in the area, playing on the beach near Eyemouth or fishing in the streams nearby.
sentences.translation: 这家人经常住在普雷斯城堡，也就是庄园北边缘那座大宅；亚历山大童年的大部分时间都在这一带度过，在埃茅斯附近的海滩上玩耍，或在附近的溪流里钓鱼。

structure.text: The family often stayed at Press Castle
the large mansion on the northern edge of the property
and Alexander spent much of his childhood in the area
playing on the beach near Eyemouth or fishing in the streams nearby

difficult_points: 逗号中的 the large mansion 是 Press Castle 的同位语，说明它是一座大宅。
and 连接两个完整分句，前半句写家族常住地，后半句写 Alexander 的童年经历。
playing 和 fishing 是现在分词短语，补充说明他在当地童年生活的具体活动。

expressions.meaning_zh: 度过童年的大部分时光

sentences.sentence: Even after he went to school at Merchiston Academy on the outskirts of Edinburgh, Henderson returned to Press at weekends.
sentences.translation: 即使在他到爱丁堡郊外的默奇斯顿学院上学之后，亨德森周末仍会回到普雷斯。

structure.text: Even after he went to school at Merchiston Academy on the outskirts of Edinburgh

difficult_points: Even after 引导让步意味的时间状语从句，强调上学后仍保持回 Press 的习惯。
on the outskirts of Edinburgh 修饰 Merchiston Academy，说明学校位置。
at weekends 是英式表达，表示“在周末”。

sentences.sentence: In 1849 he began a three-year apprenticeship to become an accountant.
sentences.translation: 1849年，他开始了为期三年的学徒训练，准备成为一名会计。
difficult_points: a three-year apprenticeship 是名词短语，表示持续三年的学徒期。
to become an accountant 是不定式短语，说明学徒训练的目的。
In 1849 放在句首，交代这个职业训练阶段开始的时间。

sentences.sentence: Although he never liked the prospect of a business career, he stayed with it to please his family.
sentences.translation: 虽然他从来不喜欢从商这一前景，但他为了让家人高兴还是坚持了下去。

structure.text: Although he never liked the prospect of a business career
the prospect of a business career

difficult_points: Although 引导让步状语从句，与主句“他仍坚持下去”形成转折。
it 指代前一句提到的 apprenticeship 或会计职业道路。
to please his family 是目的状语，说明他坚持的原因不是个人兴趣。

sentences.sentence: In October 1855, however, he emigrated to Canada with his wife Agnes Elder Roberts and they settled in Montreal.
sentences.translation: 然而，1855年10月，他和妻子艾格尼丝·埃尔德·罗伯茨移民到加拿大，并在蒙特利尔定居。

structure.text: he emigrated to Canada with his wife Agnes Elder Roberts

difficult_points: however 插入句中，标示他的人生方向发生转折。
with his wife Agnes Elder Roberts 说明同行者，其中 Agnes Elder Roberts 是 his wife 的同位语。
and 连接两个顺承动作：先移民加拿大，再在蒙特利尔定居。

sentences.sentence: Henderson learned photography in Montreal around the year 1857 and quickly took it up as a serious amateur.
sentences.translation: 亨德森大约在1857年于蒙特利尔学习摄影，并很快把它作为一项认真的业余爱好来投入。

structure.text: learned photography in Montreal around the year 1857
and quickly took it up as a serious amateur

difficult_points: and 连接两个动作：学习摄影和开始认真从事摄影。
it 指代 photography。
took it up 表示开始从事某项活动，不是字面上的“拿起来”。

expressions.meaning_zh: 作为认真的业余爱好者

sentences.sentence: He became a personal friend and colleague of the Scottish–Canadian photographer William Notman.
sentences.translation: 他成了苏格兰裔加拿大摄影师威廉·诺特曼的私人朋友和同事。

structure.text: a personal friend and colleague of the Scottish–Canadian photographer William Notman
of the Scottish–Canadian photographer William Notman

difficult_points: became 后接表语，说明身份关系的变化。
a personal friend and colleague 是并列名词短语，共同描述他与 Notman 的关系。
William Notman 是 the Scottish–Canadian photographer 的同位语，点明摄影师姓名。

expressions.text: a personal friend and colleague of

sentences.sentence: The two men made a photographic excursion to Niagara Falls in 1860 and they cooperated on experiments with magnesium flares as a source of artificial light in 1865.
sentences.translation: 这两人在1860年前往尼亚加拉瀑布进行了一次摄影旅行，并于1865年合作开展了用镁光闪光作为人工光源的实验。

structure.text: The two men made a photographic excursion to Niagara Falls in 1860
and they cooperated on experiments with magnesium flares as a source of artificial light in 1865
as a source of artificial light

difficult_points: and 连接两个按时间推进的事件，分别发生在1860年和1865年。
cooperated on 表示在某项实验上合作，介词 on 后接合作事项。
as a source of artificial light 说明 magnesium flares 在实验中的用途。

sentences.sentence: They belonged to the same societies and were among the founding members of the Art Association of Montreal.
sentences.translation: 他们属于同一些协会，并且是蒙特利尔艺术协会的创始成员之一。

structure.text: and were among the founding members of the Art Association of Montreal
of the Art Association of Montreal

difficult_points: They 指 Henderson 和 William Notman 两人。
belonged to 与 were among 并列，说明两人在摄影和艺术社群中的共同身份。
among the founding members 表示“属于创始成员之列”，不是唯一创始人。

sentences.sentence: Henderson acted as chairman of the association's first meeting, which was held in Notman's studio on 11 January 1860.
sentences.translation: 亨德森在该协会的第一次会议上担任主席，这次会议于1860年1月11日在诺特曼的工作室举行。

structure.text: Henderson acted as chairman of the association's first meeting
as chairman of the association's first meeting
which was held in Notman's studio on 11 January 1860

difficult_points: acted as 表示“担任”，后接职务身份 chairman。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明 the association's first meeting。
was held 是被动语态，说明会议被举行的地点和日期。

sentences.sentence: In spite of their friendship, their styles of photography were quite different.
sentences.translation: 尽管他们是朋友，但他们的摄影风格却很不相同。
difficult_points: In spite of 是介词短语，表示让步关系，不能当作从句。
their 指 Henderson 和 Notman 两人。
quite different 是表语，说明两人的摄影风格存在明显差异。

sentences.sentence: While Notman's landscapes were noted for their bold realism, Henderson for the first 20 years of his career produced romantic images, showing the strong influence of the British landscape tradition.
sentences.translation: 诺特曼的风景作品以大胆的现实主义著称，而亨德森在职业生涯的前20年创作的是浪漫主义图像，显示出英国风景传统的强烈影响。

structure.text: While Notman's landscapes were noted for their bold realism
Henderson for the first 20 years of his career produced romantic images
showing the strong influence of the British landscape tradition

difficult_points: While 在这里表示对比，不只是时间上的“当……时”。
were noted for 是被动表达，意思是“以……著称”。
showing 引导现在分词短语，说明 Henderson 的浪漫图像体现了何种艺术影响。

sentences.sentence: His artistic and technical progress was rapid and in 1865 he published his first major collection of landscape photographs.
sentences.translation: 他的艺术和技术进步很快，并于1865年出版了自己的第一部重要风景摄影集。

structure.text: His artistic and technical progress was rapid
and in 1865 he published his first major collection of landscape photographs

difficult_points: artistic and technical 并列修饰 progress，说明进步同时体现在艺术和技术层面。
and 连接两个相关事实：进步很快以及出版首部重要作品集。
of landscape photographs 修饰 collection，说明作品集内容。

sentences.sentence: The publication had limited circulation (only seven copies have ever been found), and was called Canadian Views and Studies.
sentences.translation: 这本出版物发行量有限（迄今只发现过七本），名为《加拿大景观与研究》。

structure.text: only seven copies have ever been found
and was called Canadian Views and Studies

difficult_points: 括号内容补充解释 limited circulation，用现有发现的数量说明发行稀少。
have ever been found 是现在完成时被动语态，强调到现在为止只找到七本。
and was called 与 had limited circulation 共享主语 The publication。

sentences.sentence: The contents of each copy vary significantly and have proved a useful source for evaluating Henderson's early work.
sentences.translation: 每一本的内容都有显著差异，并已证明是评估亨德森早期作品的有用来源。

structure.text: and have proved a useful source

difficult_points: The contents 是复数主语，所以谓语用 vary 和 have proved。
have proved 表示“已经证明是”，后接补语 a useful source。
for evaluating Henderson's early work 说明这些内容作为资料的用途。

sentences.sentence: In 1866, he gave up his business to open a photographic studio, advertising himself as a portrait and landscape photographer.
sentences.translation: 1866年，他放弃了自己的生意，开办了一间摄影工作室，并宣传自己是肖像和风景摄影师。

structure.text: advertising himself as a portrait and landscape photographer

difficult_points: gave up 表示“放弃”，这里指离开原来的商业生涯。
to open a photographic studio 是目的状语，说明放弃生意的目的。
advertising himself as... 是现在分词短语，补充说明他开工作室时对外宣传的身份。

sentences.sentence: From about 1870 he dropped portraiture to specialize in landscape photography and other views.
sentences.translation: 从大约1870年起，他放弃肖像摄影，转而专攻风景摄影和其他景观题材。

structure.text: to specialize in landscape photography and other views

difficult_points: From about 1870 表示职业方向变化开始的大致时间。
dropped portraiture 中 dropped 表示“停止、放弃”，不是“掉落”。
to specialize in 说明他放弃肖像摄影后的新专业方向。

sentences.sentence: His numerous photographs of city life revealed in street scenes, houses, and markets are alive with human activity, and although his favourite subject was landscape he usually composed his scenes around such human pursuits as farming the land, cutting ice on a river, or sailing down a woodland stream.
sentences.translation: 他大量关于城市生活的照片，通过街景、房屋和市场展现出来，充满人的活动；虽然他最喜爱的主题是风景，但他通常围绕耕作土地、在河上凿冰或沿林间溪流航行等人类活动来构图。

structure.text: His numerous photographs of city life revealed in street scenes, houses, and markets are alive with human activity
revealed in street scenes, houses, and markets
and although his favourite subject was landscape
he usually composed his scenes around such human pursuits as farming the land, cutting ice on a river, or sailing down a woodland stream

difficult_points: 主语是 His numerous photographs of city life，revealed in... 是过去分词短语作后置修饰。
are alive with 表示“充满”，说明这些照片中有人类活动的生气。
although 引导让步从句，说明尽管风景是他的偏好，他仍经常把人的活动放入风景构图。
such human pursuits as 后面列举 farming、cutting、sailing 三类活动。

sentences.sentence: There was sufficient demand for these types of scenes and others he took depicting the lumber trade, steamboats and waterfalls to enable him to make a living.
sentences.translation: 市场对这类场景以及他拍摄的其他表现木材贸易、汽船和瀑布的照片有足够需求，使他能够以此谋生。

structure.text: There was sufficient demand for these types of scenes and others
depicting the lumber trade, steamboats and waterfalls
to enable him to make a living

difficult_points: There was 是存在句，真正的信息重点是 sufficient demand。
he took 是省略关系代词的定语从句，修饰 others，即其他照片。
depicting... 是现在分词短语，说明这些照片表现的内容。
to enable him to make a living 表示结果或用途：需求足以让他谋生。

sentences.sentence: There was little competing hobby or amateur photography before the late 1880s because of the time-consuming techniques involved and the weight of the equipment.
sentences.translation: 在19世纪80年代末之前，几乎没有与之竞争的业余或爱好摄影，因为相关技术耗时，而且设备沉重。

structure.text: There was little competing hobby or amateur photography before the late 1880s
because of the time-consuming techniques involved and the weight of the equipment

difficult_points: There was little... 表示“几乎没有……”，little 带有否定含义。
because of 是介词短语，后接名词成分说明原因，不是从句。
involved 作后置修饰，说明这些耗时技术是摄影过程中所涉及的技术。

sentences.sentence: People wanted to buy photographs as souvenirs of a trip or as gifts, and catering to this market, Henderson had stock photographs on display at his studio for mounting, framing, or inclusion in albums.
sentences.translation: 人们想购买照片作为旅行纪念品或礼物；为了迎合这一市场，亨德森在自己的工作室展示库存照片，供装裱、加框或收入相册。

structure.text: People wanted to buy photographs as souvenirs of a trip or as gifts
as souvenirs of a trip or as gifts
Henderson had stock photographs on display at his studio for mounting, framing, or inclusion in albums

difficult_points: as souvenirs... or as gifts 说明购买照片的用途。
catering to this market 是现在分词短语，说明 Henderson 展示库存照片的商业目的。
had stock photographs on display 表示“把库存照片陈列出来”，不是单纯拥有照片。
for mounting, framing, or inclusion in albums 列出这些照片后续处理或使用的方式。

sentences.sentence: Henderson frequently exhibited his photographs in Montreal and abroad, in London, Edinburgh, Dublin, Paris, New York, and Philadelphia.
sentences.translation: 亨德森经常在蒙特利尔以及海外展出自己的照片，地点包括伦敦、爱丁堡、都柏林、巴黎、纽约和费城。

structure.text: in London, Edinburgh, Dublin, Paris, New York, and Philadelphia

difficult_points: frequently 表示动作频率，说明展出不是偶发事件。
in Montreal and abroad 先概括地点范围，后面的城市进一步列举 abroad 包含的地点。
his photographs 是 exhibited 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: He met with greater success in 1877 and 1878 in New York when he won first prizes in the exhibition held by E and H T Anthony and Company for landscapes using the Lambertype process.
sentences.translation: 1877年和1878年，他在纽约取得了更大的成功：他在E and H T Anthony and Company举办的展览中，凭借使用 Lambertype 工艺创作的风景作品获得一等奖。

structure.text: He met with greater success in 1877 and 1878 in New York
when he won first prizes in the exhibition
held by E and H T Anthony and Company
for landscapes using the Lambertype process

difficult_points: met with greater success 是固定搭配，表示“获得更大成功”。
when 引导的从句说明他取得成功的具体情形。
held by... 是过去分词短语，修饰 exhibition，说明展览主办方。
using the Lambertype process 修饰 landscapes，说明获奖风景作品采用的工艺。

sentences.sentence: In 1878 his work won second prize at the world exhibition in Paris.
sentences.translation: 1878年，他的作品在巴黎世界博览会上获得二等奖。

structure.text: at the world exhibition in Paris

difficult_points: his work 指 Henderson 的摄影作品。
won second prize 是获奖表达，直接说明奖项等级。
at the world exhibition in Paris 说明获奖发生的展会和地点。

sentences.sentence: In the 1870s and 1880s Henderson travelled widely throughout Quebec and Ontario, in Canada, documenting the major cities of the two provinces and many of the villages in Quebec.
sentences.translation: 在19世纪70年代和80年代，亨德森在加拿大魁北克省和安大略省广泛旅行，记录这两个省的主要城市以及魁北克的许多村庄。

structure.text: Henderson travelled widely throughout Quebec and Ontario, in Canada
documenting the major cities of the two provinces and many of the villages in Quebec

difficult_points: travelled widely 表示旅行范围广，而不是单次短途旅行。
in Canada 是插入补充，说明 Quebec and Ontario 所属国家。
documenting 是现在分词短语，说明旅行过程中的摄影记录目的或结果。
of the two provinces 修饰 the major cities，指魁北克和安大略两省。

sentences.sentence: He was especially fond of the wilderness and often travelled by canoe on the Blanche, du Lièvre, and other noted eastern rivers.
sentences.translation: 他尤其喜爱荒野，并常乘独木舟在布兰什河、迪列夫尔河以及其他著名的东部河流上旅行。

structure.text: He was especially fond of the wilderness
and often travelled by canoe on the Blanche, du Lièvre, and other noted eastern rivers

difficult_points: was especially fond of 表示强烈偏好，说明他对荒野的兴趣。
and 连接状态描述和经常性的旅行行为。
on the Blanche, du Lièvre, and other noted eastern rivers 列举他乘独木舟旅行的河流。

sentences.sentence: He went on several occasions to the Maritimes and in 1872 he sailed by yacht along the lower north shore of the St Lawrence River.
sentences.translation: 他曾多次前往加拿大海洋省份，并在1872年乘游艇沿圣劳伦斯河下游北岸航行。

structure.text: He went on several occasions to the Maritimes
and in 1872 he sailed by yacht along the lower north shore of the St Lawrence River
along the lower north shore of the St Lawrence River

difficult_points: on several occasions 表示“多次”，说明他不止一次到访 Maritimes。
and 连接两个旅行事实，后半句具体给出1872年的航行。
along the lower north shore... 说明航行路线，而不是目的地。

sentences.sentence: That same year, while in the lower St Lawrence River region, he took some photographs of the construction of the Intercolonial Railway.
sentences.translation: 同年，他在圣劳伦斯河下游地区时，拍摄了一些殖民地间铁路建设的照片。

structure.text: while in the lower St Lawrence River region
took some photographs of the construction of the Intercolonial Railway

difficult_points: That same year 指上一句中的1872年。
while in... 是省略结构，完整理解为 while he was in the lower St Lawrence River region。
of the construction of the Intercolonial Railway 修饰 photographs，说明照片内容。

sentences.sentence: This undertaking led in 1875 to a commission from the railway to record the principal structures along the almost-completed line connecting Montreal to Halifax.
sentences.translation: 这项工作使他在1875年获得铁路方面的一项委托，记录那条几乎完工、连接蒙特利尔和哈利法克斯的线路沿线的主要建筑结构。

structure.text: led in 1875 to a commission from the railway
to record the principal structures along the almost-completed line

difficult_points: This undertaking 指上一句拍摄 Intercolonial Railway 建设的工作。
led ... to a commission 表示这项工作带来了委托，in 1875 插在动词短语中间。
to record... 是不定式短语，说明委托的内容。
connecting Montreal to Halifax 修饰 line，说明这条线路连接的两座城市。

sentences.sentence: Commissions from other railways followed.
sentences.translation: 随后，其他铁路公司也向他发出了委托。
difficult_points: Commissions 是复数主语，指来自其他铁路公司的拍摄委托。
followed 在这里表示“随后出现”，不是物理上的跟随。
from other railways 修饰 Commissions，说明委托来源。

sentences.sentence: In 1876 he photographed bridges on the Quebec, Montreal, Ottawa and Occidental Railway between Montreal and Ottawa.
sentences.translation: 1876年，他拍摄了魁北克、蒙特利尔、渥太华及西方铁路在蒙特利尔和渥太华之间的桥梁。

structure.text: photographed bridges on the Quebec, Montreal, Ottawa and Occidental Railway

difficult_points: photographed 在这里是动词，表示“拍摄”。
on the Quebec, Montreal, Ottawa and Occidental Railway 修饰 bridges，说明桥梁所属线路。
between Montreal and Ottawa 进一步限定这些桥梁所在区间。

sentences.sentence: In 1885 he went west along the Canadian Pacific Railway (CPR) as far as Rogers Pass in British Columbia, where he took photographs of the mountains and the progress of construction.
sentences.translation: 1885年，他沿加拿大太平洋铁路向西行至不列颠哥伦比亚省的罗杰斯山口，并在那里拍摄山脉和建设进展的照片。

structure.text: In 1885 he went west along the Canadian Pacific Railway (CPR) as far as Rogers Pass in British Columbia
as far as Rogers Pass in British Columbia
where he took photographs of the mountains and the progress of construction

difficult_points: went west 表示向西行进，along... 说明他沿着加拿大太平洋铁路路线前进。
as far as 表示“远至、一直到”，强调到达 Rogers Pass。
where 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明他在 Rogers Pass 做了什么。
the progress of construction 指铁路建设的进展。

sentences.sentence: In 1892 Henderson accepted a full-time position with the CPR as manager of a photographic department which he was to set up and administer.
sentences.translation: 1892年，亨德森接受了加拿大太平洋铁路的一份全职职位，担任一个摄影部门的经理，而这个部门将由他建立并管理。

structure.text: Henderson accepted a full-time position with the CPR
as manager of a photographic department
which he was to set up and administer

difficult_points: with the CPR 说明职位所在机构，而不是随同某人。
as manager... 说明他接受该职位后的具体身份。
which 指 a photographic department。
was to set up and administer 表示按安排或职责将要建立并管理该部门。

sentences.sentence: His duties included spending four months in the field each year.
sentences.translation: 他的职责包括每年在外地工作四个月。

structure.text: spending four months in the field each year

difficult_points: included 后接动名词短语 spending...，说明职责内容。
in the field 表示在实地或外勤地点，而不是“在田地里”的狭义含义。
each year 说明这种外勤工作是每年的固定安排。

sentences.sentence: That summer he made his second trip west, photographing extensively along the railway line as far as Victoria.
sentences.translation: 那年夏天，他第二次西行，沿铁路一路广泛拍摄，最远到达维多利亚。

structure.text: he made his second trip west
photographing extensively along the railway line as far as Victoria

difficult_points: That summer 指1892年的夏天。
made his second trip west 表示第二次向西旅行，不是制作旅行。
photographing extensively 是现在分词短语，补充说明这次西行期间的主要活动。
as far as Victoria 表示最远到维多利亚。

sentences.sentence: He continued in this post until 1897, when he retired completely from photography.
sentences.translation: 他一直担任这一职位直到1897年，那一年他彻底退出了摄影。

structure.text: He continued in this post until 1897
when he retired completely from photography

difficult_points: this post 指上一句提到的 CPR 摄影部门经理职位。
until 1897 说明任职持续到1897年为止。
when 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明1897年发生的关键事件。
retired completely from photography 表示彻底结束摄影事业。

sentences.sentence: When Henderson died in 1913, his huge collection of glass negatives was stored in the basement of his house.
sentences.translation: 亨德森于1913年去世时，他大量的玻璃底片收藏被存放在他家的地下室里。

structure.text: his huge collection of glass negatives
was stored in the basement of his house

difficult_points: When 引导时间状语从句，交代收藏存放状态的时间背景。
his huge collection of glass negatives 是主句主语，核心词是 collection。
was stored 是被动语态，强调底片收藏被存放的位置。

sentences.sentence: Today collections of his work are held at the National Archives of Canada, Ottawa, and the McCord Museum of Canadian History, Montreal.
sentences.translation: 如今，他的作品收藏保存在渥太华的加拿大国家档案馆以及蒙特利尔的加拿大历史麦科德博物馆。

structure.text: at the National Archives of Canada, Ottawa, and the McCord Museum of Canadian History, Montreal

difficult_points: Today 与前一句的 When Henderson died in 1913 形成时间对比，说明收藏现状。
collections of his work 是复数主语，所以谓语用 are held。
are held 是被动语态，表示作品收藏由这些机构保存。
Ottawa 和 Montreal 分别补充说明两个收藏机构所在城市。
